آتش‌سوزی پاساژ ارغوان دست‌کم ۵ کشته برجا گذاشت

پس از آن که روز سه‌شنبه پاساژ تجاری ارغوان در شهرک اندیشه شهریار - حومه جنوبی تهران - دچار آتش سوزی گسترده شد، فرماندار شهریار از کشته شدن دست کم سه نفر خبر داده و گفته است: «با توجه به در جریان بودن عملیات امداد و نجات احتمال افزایش متوفیان جدی است.»

در گزارشی دیگر خبرگزاری صدا و سیما تعداد جان باختگان را تاکنون ۵ نفر اعلام کرده است.

به گزارش خبرگزاری‌های ایران، مجتمع ارغوان در فاز چهار شهر اندیشه شهریار با بیش از ۲۵۰ واحد تجاری و ۵۰ واحد اداری است که عصر سه‌شنبه دچار حریق شد.
@VahidHeadline

📡 @VahidOnline

title: China Is Still Supplying Iran and Russia’s Drone Programs Despite U.S. Sanctions. Small Chinese companies are openly exporting dual-use drone components—including engines, batteries, fiber-optic ca...
body:
China Is Still Supplying Iran and Russia’s Drone Programs Despite U.S. Sanctions.

Small Chinese companies are openly exporting dual-use drone components—including engines, batteries, fiber-optic cables and chips—to Iran and Russia, often in defiance of U.S. sanctions.

One company, Xiamen Victory Technology, even marketed German-designed L550 drone engines linked to Iran’s Shahed-136 attack drones during recent regional fighting.

U.S. officials say stopping the trade is difficult because drones rely on common commercial parts that are easy to move through global supply chains. Many Chinese suppliers are small firms with little exposure to U.S. sanctions and increasingly operate openly.

Source: WSJ

title: U.S. President Donald J. Trump has announced that, at the request of Pakistan and other countries, and because of the military success achieved during the previous strike campaign against Iran, Pro...
body: U.S. President Donald J. Trump has announced that, at the request of Pakistan and other countries, and because of the military success achieved during the previous strike campaign against Iran, Project Freedom, the recently announced operation by the U.S. Navy to escort commercial ships through the Strait of Hormuz, will be paused indefinitely to allow for a potential agreement to be finalized and signed by Iran and the United States.

title: A child weeps bitterly after being overwhelmed by the crowd at a soup kitchen, only for another child to lend a helping hand and pull him back into line. Amidst a suffocating blockade and skyrocket...
body:
A child weeps bitterly after being overwhelmed by the crowd at a soup kitchen, only for another child to lend a helping hand and pull him back into line.

Amidst a suffocating blockade and skyrocketing prices, these little ones face the harshness of life to secure the only meal for their families a scene that embodies the pain of deprivation and the greatness of solidarity despite the agony.

Teresa Regina de Ávila e Silva, the mother of detained activist Thiago Ávila, has passed away while her son remains held by the occupation following his abduction in international waters.

title: Breaking | The Global Sumud Flotilla reports that detained activist Thiago Avila was denied the chance to speak to or say goodbye to his mother before her death, and reportedly still does not know ...
body:
Breaking | The Global Sumud Flotilla reports that detained activist Thiago Avila was denied the chance to speak to or say goodbye to his mother before her death, and reportedly still does not know she has passed away due to his isolation and lack of contact with the outside world.

They renewed calls for the immediate release of Thiago and fellow activist Saif Abukeshek, while demanding an international investigation into the interception of the flotilla and violations committed during the attack.

title: NEW | Israeli army chief says West Bank troops ‘killing like we haven’t killed since 1967’ Leaked remarks from Israeli Central Command head Maj. Gen. Avi Bluth reveal that Israeli occupation forces...
body:
NEW | Israeli army chief says West Bank troops ‘killing like we haven’t killed since 1967’

Leaked remarks from Israeli Central Command head Maj. Gen. Avi Bluth reveal that Israeli occupation forces are “killing like we haven’t killed since 1967,” including the fatal shooting of Palestinians.

Bluth acknowledged that Israeli occupation forces deliberately apply different rules to Palestinians and settlers, admitting that soldiers shoot Palestinians while avoiding attacking Israeli settlers, openly stating: “Yes, it involves discrimination.”

He also described policies allowing soldiers to deliberately shoot Palestinians in the legs at the separation barrier, leaving behind what he called “limping monuments,” as a deterrence tactic against those seeking work.

title: ⚡️Turkish media: Turkey unveils YILDIRIMHAN intercontinental ballistic missile The Turkish YILDIRIMHAN intercontinental ballistic missile has a range of 6,000 km, a speed of Mach 9 to Mach 25, four...
body:
⚡️Turkish media: 

Turkey unveils YILDIRIMHAN 
intercontinental ballistic missile

The Turkish YILDIRIMHAN intercontinental ballistic missile has a range of 6,000 km, a speed of Mach 9 to Mach 25, four liquid-fuel rocket engines, and nitrogen tetroxide propellant.

At Mach 25 speed, the Turkish YILDIRIMHAN takes about 2 minutes to reach Tel Aviv.

And there is no Saudi Arabia, UAE, Qatar, or Jordan in its path to intercept it.

Going to listen to the full Sec. Rubio conference, let me see if I can get some more clues on the next steps. - Open Source Intel
tweet

U.S. doesn’t want any offensive strikes at least until after President Trumps return from Beijing.

Two U.S. operations continue: Economic Fury, Freedom.

title: Nuno Felix Have you considered why so many consider you a lobbying firm for Israel? Bought and paid for? https://twitter.com/Felix_Nuno/status/2051792836454969439/photo/1 Please stop painting an en...
body:
Nuno Felix
Have you considered why so many consider you a lobbying firm for Israel? Bought and paid for? https://twitter.com/Felix_Nuno/status/2051792836454969439/photo/1

Please stop painting an entire think tank as focused only on Israeli security. 

Dozens of people work tirelessly everyday to defend America’s national security and foreign policy interests and beleaguered democracies — including Ukraine, Taiwan, Israel, and many others. They also work toward the rise of new democracies freed from oppressive regimes. 

This also minimizes serious work on countering China, military, cyber, proliferation, and many other threats to the United States and our allies. 

It’s lazy and inaccurate — and you know what you’re doing dangling this bogeyman to antisemitic audiences. - Andrea Stricker

title: Nuno Felix RT @Stanovaya: Something Is Shifting Inside Russia Recent developments inside Russia suggest the system is struggling to cope with mounting pressures. These include growing domestic stra...
body:
Nuno Felix
RT @Stanovaya: Something Is Shifting Inside Russia

Recent developments inside Russia suggest the system is struggling to cope with mounting pressures. These include growing domestic strains, behind-the-scenes manoeuvring among elites, rumours of a coup d’état, a tighter and more reactive grip on control, fears of losing that control, and increasing exposure to Ukrainian strikes and assassinations. All this is unfolding against a worsening external backdrop: a destabilised Middle East and stalemate over Iran, a distracted Trump, and a more militarised (including nuclear-oriented) Europe.

For the first time in years of war, there may be a shift. Pressures have reached a point where too many actors inside Russia face a new reality: the status quo is starting to threaten their own

title: ⚡🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released additional statements on operations targeting Israeli forces: “In response to the Israeli ceasefire violations and attacks on villages in southern Lebanon causing civ...
body:
⚡🇱🇧🇮🇷🇮🇱 Hezbollah has released additional statements on operations targeting Israeli forces:

“In response to the Israeli ceasefire violations and attacks on villages in southern Lebanon causing civilian casualties, we targeted a gathering of Israeli vehicles and soldiers in Adshit al-Qasr at 15:10 on May 5 with artillery shells.

We also targeted a gathering of Israeli vehicles in Al-Bayada at 15:30 with a rocket attack.

Additionally, we targeted a newly established Israeli artillery position in Rab Thalathin at 15:35 using a swarm of attack drones.

We further targeted a gathering of Israeli soldiers in Rashaf at 16:30 using an explosive drone.

we also targeted the Balat Al-Mustahad site in southern Lebanon at 18:00 with a rocket salvo.”

@wfwitness

title: Tramp: To request Pakistan and other states, because of the major military success we have achieved during the regime against Iran, and because there has been great progress towards the full-fledge...
body: Tramp: To request Pakistan and other states, because of the major military success we have achieved during the regime against Iran, and because there has been great progress towards the full-fledged agreement with Iran's representatives, we agreed together because while the situation remains in full focus, "Free project" (the movement of ships through the Hormos River) will take a short time to check if they can complete and sign the agreement.

extra.original_body: טראמפ: לבקשת פקיסטן ומדינות נוספות, בשל ההצלחה הצבאית האדירה שהשגנו במהלך המערכה נגד איראן, ומכיוון שהושגה התקדמות גדולה לעבר הסכם מלא וסופי עם נציגי איראן, הסכמנו במשותף כי בעוד שהמצור יישאר בתוקף מלא, "פרויקט חירות" (תנועת הספינות דרך מצר הורמוז) יושהה לפרק זמן קצר כדי לבחון אם ניתן להשלים ולחתום על ההסכם

title: OSINTdefender According to U.S. President Donald J. Trump, at the request of Pakistan, Project Freedom, the U.S.-led framework to ensure safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz, will be paused in...
body:
OSINTdefender
According to U.S. President Donald J. Trump, at the request of Pakistan, Project Freedom, the U.S.-led framework to ensure safe passage through the Strait of Hormuz, will be paused in an attempt to finalize a deal with Iran. Iran responded to the commencement of the framework by declaring a new control area in the strait and resuming limited strikes on shipping and some of their Gulf neighbors.
tweet

⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇸Bloomberg: The EU has urged the United States to ensure that key parts of their trade agreement are adopted by a July deadline, as tensions rise over tariffs and compliance. EU officials are ...
body:
⚡️🇪🇺🇺🇸Bloomberg: The EU has urged the United States to ensure that key parts of their trade agreement are adopted by a July deadline, as tensions rise over tariffs and compliance.

EU officials are pressing Washington to honour commitments made under the deal and move forward with implementation within the agreed timeframe.  

The push comes amid broader disputes over tariffs, with the U.S. threatening increases on European goods, raising concerns in Brussels about the future of the agreement.

@wfwitness

title: ⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇦🇪🇮🇱 Iran’s Foreign Ministry has rejected claims that it launched missiles and drones at the United Arab Emirates, accusing Abu Dhabi of collusion with the U.S. and Israel. Tehran warned that...
body:
⚡️🇮🇷🇺🇸🇦🇪🇮🇱 Iran’s Foreign Ministry has rejected claims that it launched missiles and drones at the United Arab Emirates, accusing Abu Dhabi of collusion with the U.S. and Israel.

Tehran warned that the UAE’s hosting of foreign military bases and cooperation with U.S. forces could have dangerous consequences for regional peace and stability.

They called on Abu Dhabi to cease cooperation with what it described as “hostile parties,” while reiterating that Iran would take necessary measures to defend its national security and interests. 

@wfwitness

title: ⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇶🟨Rudaw: The U.S. is asking Iran to take more concrete steps against militias in the country. A senior U.S. State Department official said Iraqi leaders understand Washington’s expectations bu...
body:
⚡️🇺🇸🇮🇶🟨Rudaw: The U.S. is asking Iran to take more concrete steps against militias in the country. 

A senior U.S. State Department official said Iraqi leaders understand Washington’s expectations but stressed that “we’re looking for action, not words.”

These steps, include removing militias from state  institutions, cutting their funding, and ending salaries to fighters.

@wfwitness
